creator: tobik@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to M from comment #0)
A core file is only useful when we have matching binaries for it.  For this
and privacy reasons it's better to provide just a backtrace instead.  I'm not
sure what the exact package version you were using was (i.e. what
'pkg query %v gmixer' returns).

Anyway I cannot reproduce and it works fine here.
